description_long: This modern bungalow is surrounded by a tall, manicured hedge, enclosing a private yard with a rectangular swimming pool and a paved patio area. The building features a mix of stone and glass facades, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side, and a flat, multi-level roof. The front entrance is marked by a small pathway leading through the hedge, flanked by round shrubs and a geometric arrangement of paving stones. On one side, there is a covered outdoor lounge area with seating and a dining table, while the opposite side has a balcony or terrace above the main entrance. The backyard is dominated by the pool, bordered by tall, slender trees and additional patio furniture. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with stone and glass facades, surrounded by a hedge, featuring a pool, patio, and outdoor lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and manicured hedge with a pathway and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio area with lounge chairs, and the covered outdoor dining space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, tall slender trees, and the back facade with more windows and patio furniture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony/terrace above the entrance and additional greenery along the hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
